text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe, you certainly seem to enjoy 
staring off into the distance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, such a frigid response is exactly what 
produces that aura of ennui.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I'm onto you. I know what your eyes 
are searching for.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That's right. I've noticed… you're looking at me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Those eyes are always seeking me out, 
in desperate search of their guiding star!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! It appears I've 
hit the nail on the head!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you credit. When it comes to 
confidence — no, delusion — no one 
does it better…
